description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a robust, angular frame and a matte black finish. The slide features bold, diagonal blue and green stripes, along with a circular blue emblem, giving it a distinctive, stylized appearance. The grip is textured for enhanced handling and appears to be made of a durable polymer or composite material, with ergonomic shaping for comfort. The trigger guard is thick and rounded, providing ample space for finger placement and control. The barrel is of standard length, with no visible threading or compensator, and the overall build suggests a reliable, high-caliber sidearm. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with blue and green diagonal stripes and a textured ergonomic grip. The design is modern, with a robust frame and distinctive colored markings on the slide.
description_view_0: The left side of the handgun shows the blue and green diagonal stripes and a circular blue emblem on the slide, with the textured grip and trigger clearly visible.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the barrel opening, front sight, and the width of the slide, with colored stripes visible along the top.
description_view_2: The right side displays the continuation of the colored stripes, the slide's angular design, and the grip's texture, with no emblem visible.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back of the slide, rear sight, and the top of the grip, with colored stripes running along the slide's length.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is robust and slightly contoured, featuring a textured surface that appears stippled or checkered for enhanced traction. It is constructed from a matte black polymer or composite material, with ergonomic shaping to fit the hand comfortably. The lower portion of the grip is squared off, and there are no visible finger grooves or embellishments, giving it a utilitarian, modern look. No logos or decorative elements are present on the grip itself.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick, rounded, and generously sized, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, matte finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement. The curvature is standard, with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and there are no integrated accessories or distinctive design elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length and profile, with a smooth exterior and no visible threading, porting, or compensator. It is finished in matte black, matching the rest of the handgun, and there are no external markings or embellishments on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features bold, diagonal blue and green stripes along its length, with a prominent circular blue emblem on the left side. There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations. The colored markings are the most distinctive visual elements on the slide.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and unobtrusive profile. There are no finger rests, flares, or visible logos or texturing on the magazine base.
